response.overview: It's Christmas - Kirstie's favourite time of the year - and in this cracker of a show, she will be sharing her festive fast track guide to ensuring the big day goes with a bang.  Kirstie loves Christmas crafts but like most of us during this busy season, doesn't have time to make everything from scratch, so she will be showing how fabulously fast crafts can beat the clock and still make a big, beautiful impact.
response.title: Kirstie's Crafty Christmas
